case_title: ANDREW OGILVIE VS. VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OGILVIE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF ANDREW OGILVIE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CAROL BREWER. DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. COURT FINDS THERE IS A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-27-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY OGILVIE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OGILVIE, ANDREW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OGILVIE, ANDREW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. SEE ATTACHMENT ONE (MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
